about_p1: Rwanda EasyRent is a modern property rental platform designed specifically for the Rwandan market. We connect property owners with tenants looking for their perfect home across all provinces of Rwanda.
about_p2: Our mission is to make property rental in Rwanda transparent, efficient, and accessible to everyone. Whether you are a property owner looking to list your properties or a tenant searching for a new home, EasyRent provides the tools you need.
about_p3: We support three languages - English, Kinyarwanda, and French - making the platform accessible to all Rwandans.
accepted_image_formats: PNG, JPG, WEBP, JFIF up to 10MB each

faq1_a: Click on the Register button in the top right corner and fill in your details. You will need to verify your email address to activate your account.
faq1_q: How do I create an account?
faq2_a: After registering as a Property Owner, go to your dashboard and click "Add Property". Fill in all the details, upload images, and submit for approval.
faq2_q: How do I list a property?
faq3_a: Our admin team typically reviews and approves properties within 24-48 hours.
faq3_q: How long does property approval take?
faq4_a: Navigate to the property details page and click "Book Now". Fill in your details and the owner will be notified of your request.
faq4_q: How do I book a property?
faq5_a: We support MTN MoMo, Airtel Money, Visa, and MasterCard payments through our secure payment gateway.
faq6_a: Yes, we use industry-standard encryption and security practices. Your personal information is never shared without your consent.
faq7_a: Yes! Click the language button in the header to switch between English, Kinyarwanda, and French at any time.
faq_subtitle: Find answers to common questions about Rwanda EasyRent.

privacy_collect_desc: We collect information you provide directly, such as your name, email address, phone number, and property details. We also automatically collect certain technical information about your device and usage.
privacy_contact_desc: If you have questions about this privacy policy, please contact us at privacy@rwanda-easyrent.com.
privacy_intro: Your privacy is important to us. This policy outlines how we collect, use, and protect your personal information when you use Rwanda EasyRent.
privacy_protection_desc: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your personal data against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction.
privacy_use_desc: We use your information to provide and improve our services, communicate with you, process transactions, and ensure platform security and integrity.

terms_account_desc: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account and password. You must provide accurate, current, and complete information during registration.
terms_intro: By using Rwanda EasyRent, you agree to these terms and conditions. Please read them carefully.
terms_liability_desc: Rwanda EasyRent acts as a platform connecting tenants and property owners. We are not party to any rental agreements and are not liable for any disputes arising from such agreements.
terms_listings_desc: Property owners are responsible for the accuracy of their listings. All properties must comply with Rwandan laws and regulations. We reserve the right to remove listings that violate our policies.
terms_payments_desc: All payments are processed securely through our payment partners. We are not responsible for disputes between tenants and property owners regarding payments.
testimonial_1: EasyRent ilifanya kutafuta nyumba yangu Kigali kuwa rahisi. Nilipata nyumba nzuri kwa siku 3 tu!
testimonial_2: Kama mmiliki nyumba, napenda jinsi EasyRent inavyoshughulikia kila kitu kuanza orodhesha hadi mawasiliano na wapanga.
testimonial_3: Jukwaa bora la nyumba Rwanda. La kitaalamu, la kuaminika na rahisi kutumia.
